cart.title: Kato Fa'atau
cart.noUnpaidInvoices: Leai pili le'i totogi na maua.
cart.addBillingAddressPrompt: Faamolemole faaofi se tuatusi tupe e faaauau ai lau faatauina.
cart.addCardPrompt: E faaofi se kata keritipi, faamolemole kiliki le faitotoa Faaofi Kata Fou.
cart.paymentActivationPrompt: Faamolemole fai le totogiaga mo le amata o le auaunaga. Pe a mauaina le totogiaga, o le a vave amataina lau auaunaga.
cart.manualBankPayment: Filifiliga Totogiaga Faatonu a le Faletupe:
cart.bankPaymentNote: Pe a uma le totogiaga, tatala se tiketi lagolago ma le transaction ID, aso, ma le aofa'i na totogi. O le a matou faaofi le totogiaga.

creditCard.deleteConfirm: E mautinoa oe e aveese lou kata aitalafu {card}?
creditCard.name: Igoa
creditCard.verifyIntroStep1: E manaomia le faamaonia a o lei maua le kata keritipi mo le faaaaogaina. O le a togi e InterServer lau kata keritipi ma ni aofai e lua e lalo ifo o le $1.00 taitasi.
creditCard.verifyBillingStatement: O nei togi o le a aliali mai i lau tusi faamaumauga togi i totonu o se nai minute, e masani lalo o ni fefaaauauina e faaali. Afai e te le vaai i nei togi, faamolemole fesootai lou kamupani kata keritipi mo ni faamatalaga.
creditCard.verifyVoidNotice: O nei togi faataga e mo le faamaonia nauna ma o le a soloia i totonu o le 3-5 aso, faatatau i lau faletupe.
creditCard.acceptTempCharges: Ou te talia le lua togi faaleaoga e lalo ifo o le $1.00 taitasi.
creditCard.verifyBankLogin: Ulufale i le faletupe initaneti a lau kata keritipi poo valaau lau faletupe e faamaonia ai le lua aofai na togina. E masani ona aliali i lalo o Togi Faaali i lau faletupe. O nei togi faataga o le a mou atu i totonu o le 3-5 aso faatatau i lau faletupe.
creditCard.enterAmountsPrompt: Faamolemole ulufale le lua aofai na togina i lau kata keritipi. E tatau ona i USD le aofai.
creditCard.currencyNote: Faamolemole manatua e ono i nisi tupe ese le togi i lau tusi togi kata keritipi nai lo le manaomia i le itulau faamaonia mulimuli. Afai e le faaali le tusi togi a lau kata keritipi le aofai fa'apitoa o fefaatauaiga i le tupe manaomia, e tatau ona fesootai lau kamupani kata keritipi.
creditCard.verifiedTooltip: Ua faamaonia ma faagaoioia le kata lenei mo le faaaaogaina i lo matou faiga.
creditCard.notVerifiedTooltip: Faatoa faatinoa le faamaonia o le kata keritipi
creditCard.enableCardTooltip: Kiliki iinei e faagaoioi ai le kata keritipi lenei.

paymentSuccess.title: Totogi Manuia
paymentSuccess.thankYou: Fa'afetai mo lou totogi. Ua manuia ona fa'ai'u lou feau.

prepays.title: Tupe Totogi Muamua
prepays.showingPage: Faaali itulau {page} o {totalPages} ma {records} faamaumauga o {totalRecords}
prepays.deletePrepayConfirm: E te mautinoa e te manaʻa e tape lau prepay #{id} ma lona talafaasolopito?

pay.title: Totogi Fatu-Tupe
pay.autoRedirect: O le a otometi faafouina lau itulau.

paymentTypes.title: Ituaiga Totogiaga
paymentTypes.ccNote: E tatau ona faatinoa le faamaonia o kata keritipi uma a o lei faaaaogaina. E faatinoa faamamonia, kiliki le faitotoa "Faatinoa".
paymentTypes.deleteInvoiceConfirm: E te mautinoa e te manaʻa e tape lau fatu-tupe {id}?
